text: Independent review passed; advisable items applied: (1) userland compile-negative leak suite (userland.SizedOpacitySuite) proving SVec/SMat do not flow into DVec/DMat and unsafe/raw are unreachable outside gale.sized; (2) exact-singularity conditioning caveats on 2x2/3x3 inverse scaladoc; (3) discriminating 3x3 det test (det 27 != leading 2x2 minor -3).
